title: Post-Incident Audit Packet Model
description: Post-Incident Audit Packet capturing the full incident timeline, actions taken, and retrospective analysis for audit compliance.

fields.name: incident_ref
fields.purpose: Reference to the incident record being audited

fields.name: timeline_entries
fields.purpose: Chronological entries documenting the incident lifecycle

fields.name: actions_taken
fields.purpose: Remediation and response actions taken during the incident

fields.name: retro_summary
fields.purpose: Narrative summary of root cause and lessons learned

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
